semantic_description: Function scans a sorted integer array a of length n without modifying it and returns the number of distinct adjacent-value runs. For n = 0 it returns 0 immediately. For n > 0 it initializes count to 1 and iterates i from 1 while i < n, incrementing count exactly when a[i] differs from a[i-1], then returns count. The required output relation is equality with array_count_distinct_sorted_spec(l), and the input array ownership/content is preserved.
